title: Marketplace Manager - Fire-Boltt International Enterprises - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Fire-Boltt International Enterprises - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fire-Boltt International Enterprises:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt International Enterprises!
